word_creator.name: word_creator
word_creator.description: Creates professional Word .docx documents with styled tables, embedded images, headings, and comparison sections. Reads data from context_data.json automatically.

input_schema.title: string — document main title
input_schema.output_filename: string — output file name (e.g. 'Report.docx'), saved under workspace/
input_schema.context_data_path: string — path to JSON context file (default: 'workspace/context_data.json')
input_schema.images: list of {path: str, caption: str} — images to embed (relative to workdir)
input_schema.sections_override: optional list of {heading, type, data_key} — override auto-detection

image_generator.name: image_generator
image_generator.description: Generates AI images using the free Pollinations.ai API. No API key required. Supports logos, illustrations, and product renders.

input_schema.prompts: list of {prompt: str, filename: str, width: int, height: int} — images to generate

data_processor.name: data_processor
data_processor.description: Reads and normalizes context_data.json. Removes raw web result noise (iteration_X keys), merges data from multiple search iterations, and returns a clean structured summary.

input_schema.output_path: string — where to save the cleaned data (default: same file)
input_schema.fields_to_extract: optional list of field names to extract specifically

chart_creator.name: chart_creator
chart_creator.description: Creates professional matplotlib charts (bar, line, pie, radar) from JSON data. Saves charts as PNG files for embedding in documents.

input_schema.charts: list of {title, chart_type, data_key, output_filename, xlabel, ylabel} — charts to create
input_schema.context_data_path: string — path to JSON data source

pdf_reader.name: pdf_reader
pdf_reader.description: Extracts and returns full text content from a PDF file page by page. Use when user uploads a PDF document for analysis, summarization, or data extraction.

excel_reader.name: excel_reader
excel_reader.description: Reads tabular data from an Excel (.xlsx) file and returns it as a formatted text table (up to 250 rows). Use for Excel data analysis.

csv_reader.name: csv_reader
csv_reader.description: Reads tabular data from a CSV file and returns it as a formatted text table (up to 250 rows). Use for CSV data analysis.
